title: Grilled Cheonggukjang Crostini
description: A unique fusion of flavors from Croatia and Korea, these charred crostini are topped with spicy cheonggukjang and a hint of smokiness.
instructions: 1. Preheat grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. Grill bread slices for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until lightly charred.
3. Meanwhile, warm the cheonggukjang in a small saucepan over low heat.
4. In a small bowl, mix together minced garlic and chopped scallions.
5. Top each toasted bread round with a spoonful of warmed cheonggukjang, a sprinkle of garlic-scallion mixture, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
